violations.text: Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (slicer) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Slicer was taken out of service to be cleaned and sanitized. New Violation. Correct By: 12/26/2024

Proper cooling methods were not used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. Egg bites were placed hot in the cold well in a covered container. Egg bites were uncovered and placed in the walk in cooler to cool rapidly. New Violation. Correct By: 12/26/2024
Paper towels dispenser observed at the food prep sink in the basement. Paper towel dispenser must be removed. New Violation. Correct By: 10/16/2024
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the quaternary ammonia sanitizing solution for the 3 bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 10/16/2024
The receptacles in the toilet rooms is lacking a cover. A toilet room used by females shall be provided with a covered receptacle for sanitary napkins. New Violation. Correct By: 10/26/2024
